description: Mandatory root element for every mobile page. Provides the top navigation bar (title, leading, actions) and the page body (items). All other content goes inside it. Templates already insert one Scaffold — do NOT insert a second one; use merge to patch it.

actions.description: Right-side action items (save button, search button).

floatAction.description: Single floating action button config object. Set to null when not needed. Object shape: { name, type: 'crt.FloatingActionButton', icon, clicked: { request } }.

items.description: Page body — array of container/component references.

description: CSS-grid layout container. Supports two-sided adaptive layout: (1) container-level 'adaptive' for per-breakpoint column counts ({"small":{"columns":[...]},"medium":{...},"large":{...}}), and (2) child-level 'layoutConfig.adaptive' on each item ({row,column,colSpan,rowSpan} per breakpoint) for explicit cell placement at each breakpoint. Edit BOTH sides for a real responsive layout — changing container columns alone leaves children pinned to their static cells. When used as a field-group container, always set "color": "primary" to provide the standard card-like surface.

columns.description: CSS grid-template-columns. Single string '1fr 1fr' or array ['1fr','1fr']. Runtime accepts both formats.

adaptive.description: Container-level per-breakpoint column overrides. Keys: 'small' (phone portrait), 'medium' (landscape/tablet portrait), 'large' (tablet landscape). Each entry holds 'columns' as a string or array (both forms accepted). Example: {"small":{"columns":["1fr"]},"medium":{"columns":["1fr","1fr"]},"large":{"columns":["1fr","1fr","1fr"]}}. To reflow children between breakpoints you must ALSO set 'layoutConfig.adaptive' on each child component.

padding.description: Padding config: { top, right, bottom, left }.

items.description: Child components. To make children participate in adaptive layout, set 'layoutConfig.adaptive' on each child with per-breakpoint {row,column,colSpan,rowSpan}. Example child layoutConfig: { "adaptive": { "small": {"row":2,"column":1,"colSpan":1,"rowSpan":1}, "medium": {"row":1,"column":2,"colSpan":1,"rowSpan":1}, "large": {"row":1,"column":2,"colSpan":1,"rowSpan":1} } }. Without per-breakpoint 'layoutConfig.adaptive' on a child, the child stays at its static layoutConfig cell even when the container's 'adaptive.columns' change.

color.description: Background color. Accepts preset names ('default', 'primary') or any hex color string (e.g. '#523838'). Use 'primary' for field-group containers by convention.

description: Flexbox layout container for linear horizontal or vertical arrangement of items.

padding.description: Padding config: { top, right, bottom, left }. Values: 'none', 'small', 'medium', 'large'.

color.description: Background color. Also accepts hex color strings.

description: Top-level tab strip container. Holds crt.TabContainer items.

selectedTabTitleColor.description: Color of the selected tab title.

underlineSelectedTabColor.description: Underline color for the selected tab.

description: Individual tab body inside crt.TabPanel.

caption.description: Tab header caption (resource string or literal).

iconPosition.description: Icon position relative to tab caption.

description: Collapsible panel that can expand to show its content.

tools.description: Tool/action components in the panel header.

expanded.description: Whether the panel is expanded by default.

padding.description: Padding config: { top, right, bottom, left }. Values: 'none', 'small', 'medium', 'large'.

description: Static text label for headings, captions, and inline explanatory copy.

labelColor.description: Text color. Use 'auto' for theme default or a hex color string.

description: Tappable button for triggering actions, navigation, and menus.

menuItems.description: Child crt.MenuItem entries for dropdown/modal menu.

menuTitle.description: Title shown on the menu picker.

description: Single floating action button attached to crt.Scaffold.floatAction. Mobile-specific.

menuTitle.description: Title shown on the menu picker.

description: Single-line text input field.
Numeric text input.

format.description: Number format config: { decimalPrecision: N }. Use 0 for integers.

description: Email-type text input with validation.
URL/web address text input.
Phone number input with call intent support.

Checkbox for Boolean fields. NOTE: In mobile pages use crt.Toggle for Boolean data-type fields — the mobile designer maps Boolean to crt.Toggle by default. Reserve crt.Checkbox for explicit tristate or custom scenarios.

value.description: Current value or bound view-model attribute (e.g. '$PDS_IsActive').

description: Lookup dropdown selector. Use for lookup and enumeration fields.

items.description: Data property attribute for lookup items.

showValueAsLink.description: Show selected value as a navigable link.

description: Date and/or time picker.
Image upload / preview field. Binds the image attribute through the 'value' property — do NOT use 'control' (it won't work).

value.description: Bound view-model attribute (e.g. '$PDS_Photo') or empty string for unbound. Use this property instead of the 'control' property

description: Multi-line rich text editor.
Numeric range slider.
Boolean toggle switch. Mobile-specific — the mobile designer maps Boolean data types to crt.Toggle (not crt.Checkbox). Always prefer crt.Toggle for Boolean fields in mobile pages.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when value changes.

description: Barcode/QR code scanner field. Mobile-only — not available in web pages.

scanned.description: Request descriptor fired when a barcode is scanned.

description: Scrollable record list bound to a data source. The designer inserts a companion crt.ListItem child into the itemLayout property. Requires a viewModelConfigDiff attribute (isCollection: true, modelConfig.path pointing to the data source) and a modelConfigDiff data source entry (crt.EntityDataSource with scope 'viewElement').

items.description: Binding to the collection attribute, e.g. '$Items'.

itemLayout.description: Container property for a crt.ListItem child. In the insert diff the value is an empty object {}; the crt.ListItem is inserted as a separate viewConfigDiff operation with parentName pointing to this List and propertyName 'itemLayout'.

itemPadding.description: Padding around each list item. Shape: { top, bottom, left, right } with values 'none' | 'extra-small' | 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' or a number.

itemSelected.description: Request descriptor fired when an item is selected, e.g. { request: 'crt.OpenPageRequest' }.

description: Item layout template inserted as a child of crt.List via propertyName 'itemLayout'. Defines the title, subtitle, body columns, and icon for each row in the list. Body items are objects with a 'value' binding (e.g. { "value": "$DataSource_ColumnName" }); they render as labeled fields automatically.

title.description: Binding to the primary display column, e.g. '$List1DS_Name'. Maps to the 'Title column' setting in the designer.

subtitles.description: Array of subtitle descriptors. Each entry is a LabeledStateProperty object.

body.description: Array of body field objects. Each item: { "value": "$DataSource_Column" }. Maps to the 'Columns' section in the designer.

icon.description: Binding to an image column or null. Maps to the 'Image' setting in the designer.

iconSize.description: Size of the icon. Accepted values: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.

showEmptyValues.description: Whether to display rows for body fields that have empty values.

actions.description: Array of action button configs shown on the list item.

description: File attachment list.

items.description: Data property attribute for the file collection.

columns.description: Column definitions for the file list.

description: Activity/message feed panel.

primaryColumnValue.description: Record ID binding for ESN messages.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for the feed.

description: Card gallery with image thumbnails.

items.description: Data property attribute for the gallery collection.

useSpecificPage.description: Open a specific page on item click.

description: Chronological timeline view for records. Contains crt.TimelineTile children.
Individual tile inside a crt.Timeline. Represents one entity type (e.g. SysFile, Feed) shown on the timeline.

sortedByColumn.description: Column name used for chronological sorting.

data.description: Tile data configuration: { schemaType (entity schema type, e.g. 'SysFile', 'Feed'), columns (array of column configs) }.

description: Horizontal stage progress bar for pipeline/status tracking.

recordId.description: Record ID binding for DCM runtime.

description: KPI / indicator metric widget.

config.description: Full indicator configuration: { title, data: { providing, formatting }, text: { template, metricMacros, fontSizeMode, labelPosition }, layout: { color, border, icon }, theme, hideTitle }.

description: Chart/graph widget for data visualization.

config.description: Full chart configuration: { title, theme, color, layout: { showLegend, showDataLabels }, series: [{ data, type, color, label }], seriesOrder, scales }.

description: Action toolbar for the folder tree (add/edit/delete folders).

rootSchemaName.description: Root schema name for folder hierarchy.

_filterOptions.description: Internal filter options. Example: { expose: [], from: ['..._active_folder_id', '..._active_folder_filter_data'] }.

description: Quick filter chip for applying a named data filter.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when filter changes.

_filterOptions.description: Internal filter options. Example: { expose: [], from: 'QuickFilter_Value' }.

description: Group of quick filter chips. Mobile-specific grouping component.

_filterOptions.description: Internal filter options. Example: { expose: [], from: 'QuickFilterGroup_Value' }.

description: Sort control for record lists. Mobile-specific.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when sort changes.

description: Menu item inside a Button or FloatingActionButton dropdown menu. Added as a child in the parent's menuItems array.

caption.description: Display text for the menu item (localizable resource string).

clicked.description: Request descriptor fired when the menu item is tapped.

icon.description: Icon identifier displayed next to the caption.

enabled.description: Whether the menu item is enabled.

description: Visual separator between menu items in a Button or FloatingActionButton dropdown menu.
